case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. JOSEFINA ARAIZA CALZADA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, JOSEFINA ARAIZA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-20-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, JOSEFINA ARAIZA
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPERANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT JOSEFINA ARAIZA CALZADA IS PRESENT. AT 8:45 A.M. THE CASE IS CONSIDERED DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF ARRIVES TO COURT AT 8:55 A.M. AFTER DEFENDANT HAS BEEN RELEASED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,072.00 FILED BY IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, JOSEFINA ARAIZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
